idea-plugin.name: Selenium Boot MCP - AI Browser Automation
idea-plugin.description:
MCP server for Selenium WebDriver browser automation.

Lets JetBrains AI Assistant control a real browser — 84 tools for navigation, element interactions, assertions, self-healing locators, and test code generation.

  • Java TestNG / JUnit 5 / Page Object / Cucumber codegen
  • Python pytest and C# NUnit codegen
  • GitHub Actions / Jenkins / GitLab CI pipeline generation
  • Playwright migration hints
  • No ChromeDriver setup — browser auto-starts on first use

Requires: pip install seleniumboot-mcp and Python 3.10+

GitHub | PyPI | Docs
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 0.3.7: CI improvements, 84 tools, Jenkins/GitLab CI codegen

action.description: Run pip install --upgrade seleniumboot-mcp in a terminal

action.text: Register MCP Server with AI Assistant
action.description: Add seleniumboot-mcp to JetBrains AI Assistant MCP servers
Verify that seleniumboot-mcp is installed and registered
